session.user:
Run the following commands and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened:
1. `ruff check src/erk/cli/json_output.py src/erk/cli/ensure.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py src/erk/tui/data/serialization.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/dash_data.py` 2. `ruff format --check src/erk/cli/json_output.py src/erk/cli/ensure.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py src/erk/tui/data/serialization.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/dash_data.py` 3. `ty check src/erk/cli/json_output.py src/erk/tui/data/serialization.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/dash_data.py`
session.assistant: I'll run these three commands and report the results.

session.assistant:
## Results Summary
**1. Ruff Check (Linting):** PASSED All checks passed!
**2. Ruff Format Check:** FAILED 1 file would be reformatted: - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py`
5 files are already properly formatted: - `src/erk/cli/json_output.py` - `src/erk/cli/ensure.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py` - `src/erk/tui/data/serialization.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/dash_data.py`
**3. Type Check (ty):** PASSED All checks passed!
### Summary - **Linting**: All files pass linting rules - **Formatting**: One file (`src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py`) needs formatting corrections - **Type checking**: All files pass type checking
